'''Brolfi''', singular '''Brolf''', were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of furry [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] who inhabited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]. Their skin, referred to as hornskin, was [[Color/Legends|colored]] between different shades of green and yellow, and quivered when the Brolf was feeling emotional. They also had stumpy [[Limb/Legends|legs]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

[[Caulfmar]] was the governor of Barlok in the time before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] during the time the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was planning to launch ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
